use_cases: Primary call-to-action for forms and dialogs
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Secondary actions as an alternative to primary buttons
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation
Ghost buttons for subtle, text-like interactive elements
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) using Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Features shadow effects, focus-visible outlines, and disabled states. Built with Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling and accessibility compliance.
